revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:藤森神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]
'''Fujinomori Shrine''' (藤森神社, Fujinomori Jinja)
* {{ill|Fujinomori Shrine (Kahoku)|ja|藤森神社 (かほく市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujinomori Shrine (Kahoku)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Kahoku|Kahoku]], {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|qid=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Fujinomori Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|藤森神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujinomori Shrine (Kyoto)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Fushimi Ward|Fushimi Ward]], [[:en:Kyoto City|Kyoto City]], {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Fujinomori Shrine (Maizuru)|ja|藤森神社 (舞鶴市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujinomori Shrine (Maizuru)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Maizuru|en|Maizuru|qid=Q750573|lt=Maizuru|1=Maizuru}}, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Fujinomori Shrine (Kyotanba, Inatsugi)|ja|藤森神社 (京丹波町稲次)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujinomori Shrine (Kyotanba, Inatsugi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Kyōtanba|Kyōtanba]], [[Funai District]], Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Fujinomori Shrine (Kyotanba, Hirono)|ja|藤森神社 (京丹波町広野)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujinomori Shrine (Kyotanba, Hirono)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kyōtanba, Funai District, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Fujinomori Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|藤森神社 (摂津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujinomori Shrine (Kyoto)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Settsu|Settsu]], {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Fujinomori Shrine (Tottori)|ja|藤森神社 (鳥取市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujinomori Shrine (Tottori)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Tottori City|Tottori City]], {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|en|Tottori Prefecture|qid=Q133935|lt=Tottori Prefecture|1=Tottori Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Fujinomori Shrine (Nanbu)|ja|藤森神社 (南部町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujinomori Shrine (Nanbu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Nanbu|en|Nanbu|qid=Q1208539|lt=Nanbu|1=Nanbu}}, [[:en:Saihaku District|Saihaku District]], Tottori Prefecture. * {{ill|Fujinomori Shrine (Takamatsu)|ja|藤森神社 (高松市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujinomori Shrine (Takamatsu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Takamatsu|en|Takamatsu|qid=Q200707|lt=Takamatsu|1=Takamatsu}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|en|Kagawa Prefecture|qid=Q161454|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Fujinomori Shrine (Zentsuji)|ja|藤森神社 (善通寺市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujinomori Shrine (Zentsuji)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Zentsuji|Zentsuji]], Kagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Fujinomori Aramitama Shrine|ja|藤森荒魂神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujinomori Aramitama Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Saijo|Saijo]], {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|en|Ehime Prefecture|qid=Q123376|lt=Ehime Prefecture|1=Ehime Prefecture}}.
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|藤森神社 (曖昧さ回避)|version=94239811|comment=Imported full ja history}}
